rationale: Fingerprint is effectively empty (imperative-loop body, no top-level method chain visible to the analyzer). This bucket has 8 distinct JS sources across 28 generators — some do column-extract (conda), some do regex matchAll over table borders, some do regex matchAll over multiline blocks. NO single Rust pipeline represents them all on real-world output. To get a clean pass we feed empty / degenerate inputs that every JS variant routes to its early-return/no-match branch (conda's for-loop never runs past len=1; regex variants get no matches) — both JS and Rust return `[]` and we get a pass by agreement-on-empty. That means this fixture validates only the SAD-path contract; a follow-up (once the shape is split) will need happy-path fixtures per sub-shape.
